title: Dark OreUI Recreation
description: A Dark Mode fork of OreUi Recreation by tmc249
body:
**[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) is required for certain blocks and entities to have their own GUIs!**

**A Dark Mode fork of OreUI Recreation by [tmc249](https://modrinth.com/user/tmc249)**

Dark Ore UI Recreation is a resource pack that tries to replicate the new Bedrock UI in Java with the Chest, Ender Chest, and Shulker Box color coded UIs as well as matching the rest of the GUIs in the game (minus the controversial Horizontal Layout) with a dark theme.

Feedback & Suggestions are appreciated via Github!

![Chest GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/000062fc20ca3c66a1553b1cc02efd1f6242d88c.png)
![Hotbar HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d0c99ce1e2195a7b4e11151bed75439478007ce.png)

**Credits**
- [tmc249 for the original version of this resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/oreui-recreation)

**Note:**
The font seen in the pictures is not included in the pack (It is a fixed version for 1.21.6+ of Injent's Minecraft Font Five resource pack: [Minecraft Font Five](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/minecraft-font-five/)
